home.title: Math Exercises
home.createOrEditLabel: Create or edit a Math Exercise

reachability.saveFirst: Save the exercise first to run the reachability check.
reachability.notSupported: Reachability check is not supported for this exercise.

mathExercise.error: An error occurred while loading the math exercise
mathExercise.selectNode: Click a node or drop a rule onto it
mathExercise.mathCompleteHint: Your derivation reaches the target expression.
mathExercise.derivationModeHint: Student writes the result expression; in inference mode the system applies the rule automatically.
mathExercise.allowVerificationHint: Show the "Verify Math" button so students can check their steps.
mathExercise.onlyShowApplicableRulesHint: Hide rules that cannot be applied at the currently selected node.
mathExercise.partialCreditEnabledHint: Award proportional points for valid steps when the math is incomplete. Requires at least one example derivation to determine the expected step count.
mathExercise.graderTypeHint: Step-by-step is the only grader available today. Lean / Isabelle / egg e-graph backends arrive in milestone 3.
mathExercise.goalModeHint: Transformation: students transform a source tree into a target tree. Equation: students reduce a single equation to a tautology (LHS structurally equals RHS).
mathExercise.goalExpressionHint: Math is complete when this reduces to a tautology (e.g. t = t).
mathExercise.goalExpressionRequired: A goal expression is required for the workspace to appear. Typical shape is an equality with two non-trivial sides.
mathExercise.noRegressRejection: This step would return to a previously visited state.
mathExercise.acNormalizationHint: Treat + and · as commutative / associative for equality comparisons. Students don't have to apply commutativity / associativity rules explicitly to make trees match.
mathExercise.hintsTitle: Ask the grader for next-step suggestions ranked by progress toward the goal.
mathExercise.verifyReachabilityHint: Run the grader's automated reducer from source/goal — useful for sanity-checking that the exercise is solvable.
mathExercise.manualHintSelectBoth: ← Select a rule and click a node, then write the result
mathExercise.expressionsRequired: Both a source and a target expression are required for the derivation workspace to appear for students.
mathExercise.noExampleSolutions: No example solutions yet. Click "Add example solution" to add one.

builder.empty: No expression yet. Drag a block here or select a type and click Insert.
